settings.title: 43L Big Capacity
settings.text: Symmetrical 43L bicycle bag: 5 large & 3 small pockets. Adjustable elastic top expands for helmets/raincoats; easy to carry cycling essentials.

settings.title: Totally Waterproof
settings.text: Premium 600D nylon/Oxford fabric ensures full waterproofing. Zippers feature dedicated waterproof shields, plus detachable rain cover for complete weather protection. Durable and reliable.

settings.title: Safety Reflective Strip
settings.text: Adorned with reflective strips around the pannier, this design dramatically enhances your visibility in low-light conditions, ensuring a safer and more confident ride

settings.title: Easy Installation
settings.text: Simply attach the bike pannier to your rear rack and secure it with buckle straps and tri-glide sliders for a quick and hassle-free setup

Designed for cyclists, this 43L rear bike pannier combines spacious utility with rugged durability. Featuring 5 large and 3 small pockets, plus a stretchable elastic top for helmets or raincoats, it effortlessly organizes all essentials. Crafted from 600D waterproof nylon/Oxford fabric, every zipper is shielded with waterproof covers, and an extra detachable rain guard ensures total weather resistance. Reflective strips boost visibility in low light, while buckle straps and tri-glide sliders enable quick, secure attachment to bike racks. Built for adventure, trusted for reliability.
